prompt: Our greenhouse dashboards have little gaps in them and I finally cornered when they happen: any reading that a sensor produces while an upload is already on the wire just never reaches ingest. The maddening part is the agent's own bookkeeping swears everything is fine — uploaded_count matches the number of add() calls perfectly, pending is empty, no errors anywhere. The reading is simply not in any batch the sink ever saw. Quiet periods (nothing arriving during a flush) upload flawlessly. telemetry.py, repro python3 test_telemetry.py. Fix the buffer so nothing is dropped; don't rearrange the test to hide it.
